77.reason: [isalpha() returns non-zero for alphabetic characters, not necessarily 1. Should be `if(isalpha(temp))` instead of `if(isalpha(temp)==1)`. This causes non-alphabetic characters to be incorrectly processed, leading to no words being read.]
